nodes.label: rize-mobile CI Pipeline (simulator build/test/lint)
nodes.rationale: RIZ-66: 20-minute timeout because a hung test would otherwise burn macOS runner minutes (billed at a higher multiplier than Linux) for hours; bounds that failure mode to a fast, cheap failure.

nodes.label: Mobile Coverage Gate (COVERAGE_THRESHOLD 80, coverage-check.sh)
nodes.rationale: RIZ-47/RIZ-66: single knob for the app-target line-coverage gate. RIZ-66 raised actual coverage from 70.62% to 86.15%; the remaining gap to 90% is concentrated in SwiftUI view bodies with little extractable logic, so 80 is the threshold the user signed off on given that ceiling.
